folio.label: 100v
folio.l: To tempte his wyf , was sette al his entent
¢ Whan that his dougúter , twelue ©er was of age
He to the courte of Rome , in subtyl wyse
Enformed of his wyl , sent his message
Comaundyngö hem , swicú bulles to deuyse
As to his cruel purpos , may suffise
How that the Pope , as for his peeples reest
Bad hi~ to wedde , a nother if hi~ list
¢ I sey , he bad , they shulde countrefete
The Popes bulles , makyngö menciou~
That he hatú leue , his first wyf to lete
As by the Popes , dispensaciouö
To stynte rancour , and discenciouö
Be twix his peeple & hi~ , thus seide the bulle
The whicú they han , publisshed at the fulle
¢ TeTheThe rude peeple , as it no wondir is
Wende ful wele , that it had ben rigút so
But whanne theise tidynggis , comen to Grisildis
I deme , that hire herte , was ful woo
But she e lyke sad , for euäe moo
Disposed was , this humble creature
The aduäsite of fortune , al to endure
¢ A bidyngö euäe his lust , and his plesaunce
To whom that she was ©euen , hert and al
As to hire verray worldly , suffisaunce
But shortly , if I this story , tellen shal
This Markys , wryten hatú in special
A &lbar;re , in whicú he shewetú , his entent
And secretly , he to Boloigne , it sent
¢ To the Erl of Pauyk , whicú that hadde tho
Wedded his Suster , preyed he specially
To bryngen hom a geyn , hise children two
In honurable estat , al openly
But oo thyngö he hi~ preyed , vtterly
That he to no wygút , thougú men wolde enquere
Shulde nat telle , whos children that they were
¢ But seyn that the mayden , shulde wedded be
Vn to the Markys , of Saluce a noon
And as this Erl was preyed , so dide he
For at the day sette , he on his wey is gon
And fortú he rod / ful fast a noon
Toward Saluce , this Mayde for to gyde

note.notetxt: 775/aThe scribe has compounded 775 and 776 making the hybrid 775a.Est
775aThere is nothing in the MS which might suggest a codicological interference.ODR

folio.l: Hire ©onge brother , ridyngö hire besyde
¢ Arrayed was , toward hire mariage
This fressú May , ful of gemmes clere
